content.text: ### app/models/stories_paginator.rb 1 # typed: false 2 3 class StoriesPaginator 4 attr_accessor :per_page 5 6 STORIES_PER_PAGE = 25 7 8 def initialize(scope, page = 1, user = nil) 9 @scope = scope 10 @page = page 11 @user = user 12 @per_page = STORIES_PER_PAGE 13 end 14 15 def get 16 with_pagination_info @scope.limit(per_page + 1) 17 .offset((@page - 1) * per_page) 18 .for_presentation 19 end 20 21 private 22 23 def with_pagination_info(scope) 24 scope = scope.to_a 25 show_more = scope.count > per_page 26 scope.pop if show_more 27 28 [cache_votes(scope), show_more] 29 end 30 31 def cache_votes(scope) 32 if @user 33 votes = Vote.votes_by_user_for_stories_hash(@user.id, scope.map(&:id)) 34 35 hs = HiddenStory.where(user_id: @user.id, story_id: scope.map(&:id)).map(&:story_id) 36 ss = SavedStory.where(user_id: @user.id, story_id: scope.map(&:id)).map(&:story_id) 37 38 scope.each do |s| 39 s.current_vote = votes[s.id] 40 if hs.include?(s.id) 41 s.is_hidden_by_cur_user = true 42 end 43 if ss.include?(s.id) 44 s.is_saved_by_cur_user = true 45 end 46 end 47 end 48 scope 49 end 50 end ### app/models/stats.rb 1 # typed: false 2 3 class Stats 4 FIRST_MONTH = Time.new(2012, 7, 3).utc.freeze 5 TIMESCALE_DIVISIONS = "1 year".freeze 6 7 def self.fill_users_graph_cache 8 cache_monthly_graph(:users, { 9 graph_title: "Users joining by month", 10 scale_y_divisions: 100 11 }) { 12 User.pluck(:created_at).map { |created_at| created_at.strftime("%Y-%m") }.tally.sort.flatten 13 } 14 end 15 16 def self.fill_active_users_graph_cache 17 cache_monthly_graph(:active_users, { 18 graph_title: "Active users by month", 19 scale_y_divisions: 500, 20 extrapolate: false 21 }) { 22 stories = Story.pluck(:created_at, :user_id).map { |created_at, user_id| [created_at.strftime("%Y-%m"), user_id] } 23 votes = Vote.pluck(:updated_at, :user_id).map { |updated_at, user_id| [updated_at.strftime("%Y-%m"), user_id] } 24 comments = Comment.pluck(:created_at, :user_id).map { |created_at, user_id| [created_at.strftime("%Y-%m"), user_id] } 25 combined = (stories + votes + comments).group_by(&:first).transform_values { |record| record.map(&:last).uniq.count } 26 combined.sort.flatten 27 } 28 end 29 30 def self.fill_stories_graph_cache 31 cache_monthly_graph(:stories, { 32 graph_title: "Stories submitted by month", 33 scale_y_divisions: 250 34 }) { 35 Story.pluck(:created_at).map { |created_at| created_at.strftime("%Y-%m") }.tally.sort.flatten 36 } 37 end 38 39 def self.fill_comments_graph_cache 40 cache_monthly_graph(:comments, { 41 graph_title: "Comments posted by month", 42 scale_y_divisions: 1_000 43 }) { 44 Comment.pluck(:created_at).map { |created_at| created_at.strftime("%Y-%m") }.tally.sort.flatten 45 } 46 end 47 48 def self.fill_votes_graph_cache 49 cache_monthly_graph(:votes, { 50 graph_title: "Votes cast by month", 51 scale_y_divisions: 10_000 52 }) { 53 Vote.pluck(:updated_at).map { |updated_at| updated_at.strftime("%Y-%m") }.tally.sort.flatten 54 } 55 end 56 57 def self.cache_key(name) 58 "stats_graphs/#{name}" 59 end 60 61 def self.get_cached_graph(name) 62 Rails.cache.read(cache_key(name)) || "No data" 63 end 64 65 DEFAULTS = { 66 width: 800, 67 height: 300, 68 graph_title: "Graph", 69 show_graph_title: false, 70 extrapolate: true, 71 no_css: false, 72 key: false, 73 scale_x_integers: true, 74 scale_y_integers: false, 75 show_data_values: false, 76 show_x_guidelines: false, 77 show_x_title: false, 78 x_title: "Time", 79 show_y_title: false, 80 y_title: "Users", 81 y_title_text_direction: :bt, 82 stagger_x_labels: false, 83 x_label_format: "%Y-%m", 84 y_label_format: "%Y-%m", 85 min_x_value: FIRST_MONTH, 86 timescale_divisions: TIMESCALE_DIVISIONS, 87 add_popups: true, 88 popup_format: "%Y-%m", 89 area_fill: false, 90 min_y_value: 0, 91 number_format: "%d", 92 show_lines: false 93 } 94 95 def self.cache_monthly_graph(name, opts) 96 graph = TimeSeries.new(DEFAULTS.merge(opts)) 97 graph.add_data( 98 data: yield, 99 template: "%Y-%m" 100 ) 101 svg = graph.burn_svg_only 102 103 Rails.cache.write(cache_key(name), svg, expires_in: 2.days) 104 end 105 end ### app/models/flagged_commenters.rb 1 # typed: false 2 3 # Finds the consistent most-heavily-flagged commenters. Requires flags to be spread over 4 # several comments and stories because anyone can have a bad thread or a bad day. 5 6 class FlaggedCommenters 7 include IntervalHelper 8 9 attr_reader :interval, :period, :cache_time 10 11 def initialize(interval, cache_time = 30.minutes) 12 @interval = interval 13 @cache_time = cache_time 14 length = time_interval(interval) 15 @period = length[:dur].send(length[:intv].downcase).ago 16 end 17 18 def check_list_for(showing_user) 19 commenters[showing_user.id] 20 end 21 22 # aggregates for all commenters; not just those receiving flags 23 def aggregates 24 Rails.cache.fetch("aggregates_#{interval}_#{cache_time}", expires_in: cache_time) { 25 ActiveRecord::Base.connection.exec_query(" 26 select 27 stddev(sum_flags) as stddev, 28 sum(sum_flags) as sum, 29 avg(sum_flags) as avg, 30 avg(n_comments) as n_comments, 31 count(*) as n_commenters 32 from ( 33 select 34 sum(flags) as sum_flags, 35 count(*) as n_comments 36 from comments join users on comments.user_id = users.id 37 where 38 (comments.created_at >= '#{period}') and 39 users.banned_at is null and 40 users.deleted_at is null 41 GROUP BY comments.user_id 42 ) sums; 43 ").first.symbolize_keys! 44 } 45 end 46 47 def stddev_sum_flags 48 aggregates[:stddev].to_f 49 end 50 51 def avg_sum_flags 52 aggregates[:avg].to_f 53 end 54 55 def commenters 56 Rails.cache.fetch("flagged_commenters_#{interval}_#{cache_time}", 57 expires_in: cache_time) { 58 rank = 0 59 User.active.joins(:comments) 60 .where("comments.created_at >= ?", period) 61 .group("comments.user_id") 62 .select(" 63 users.id, users.username, 64 (sum(flags) - #{avg_sum_flags})/#{stddev_sum_flags} as sigma, 65 count(distinct if(flags > 0, comments.id, null)) as n_comments, 66 count(distinct if(flags > 0, story_id, null)) as n_stories, 67 sum(flags) as n_flags, 68 sum(flags)/count(distinct comments.id) as average_flags, 69 ( 70 count(distinct if(flags > 0, comments.id, null)) / 71 count(distinct comments.id) 72 ) * 100 as percent_flagged") 73 .having("n_comments > 4 and n_stories > 1 and n_flags >= 10 and percent_flagged > 10") 74 .order(sigma: :desc) 75 .limit(30) 76 .each_with_object({}) { |u, hash| 77 hash[u.id] = { 78 username: u.username, 79 rank: rank += 1, 80 sigma: u.sigma, 81 n_comments: u.n_comments, 82 n_stories: u.n_stories, 83 n_flags: u.n_flags, 84 average_flags: u.average_flags, 85 stddev: 0, 86 percent_flagged: u.percent_flagged 87 } 88 } 89 } 90 end 91 end ### app/models/comment_vote_hydrator.rb 1 class CommentVoteHydrator 2 include Enumerable 3 4 delegate :size, :length, :empty?, :any?, to: :@comments 5 6 def initialize(comments, user) 7 @comments = comments 8 @user = user 9 if @user.nil? || comments.empty? 10 @votes = {} 11 @vote_summaries = {} 12 @current_user_reply_parents = {} 13 else 14 comment_ids = comments.map(&:id) 15 @votes = Vote.comment_votes_by_user_for_comment_ids_hash(@user.id, comment_ids) 16 @vote_summaries = Vote.comment_vote_summaries(comment_ids) 17 @current_user_reply_parents = @user.ids_replied_to(comment_ids) 18 end 19 end 20 21 def each 22 @comments.each { |c| yield self[c] } 23 end 24 25 private 26 27 def [](comment) 28 comment.current_vote ||= @votes[comment.id] 29 comment.vote_summary ||= @vote_summaries[comment.id] 30 comment.current_reply ||= @current_user_reply_parents.key?(comment.id) 31 comment 32 end 33 end ### app/models/inactive_user.rb 1 # typed: false 2 3 module InactiveUser 4 def self.inactive_user 5 @inactive_user ||= User.find_by!(username: "inactive-user") 6 end 7 8 def self.disown! comment_or_story 9 author = comment_or_story.user 10 comment_or_story.update_column(:user_id, inactive_user.id) 11 refresh_counts! author 12 end 13 14 def self.disown_all_by_author! author 15 # leave attribution on deleted stuff, which is generally very relevant to mods 16 # when looking back at returning users 17 author.stories.not_deleted(nil).update_all(user_id: inactive_user.id) 18 author.comments.active.update_all(user_id: inactive_user.id) 19 refresh_counts! author 20 end 21 22 def self.refresh_counts! user 23 user&.refresh_counts! 24 inactive_user.refresh_counts! 25 end 26 end ### extras/routes.rb 1 # https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=c14M6QeFVgY 2 class Routes 3 class << self 4 # this brings in all of config/routes, eg. root_path or story_short_id_url 5 include Rails.application.routes.url_helpers 6 7 # class setting 8 9 def default_url_options 10 Rails.application.config.action_mailer.default_url_options 11 end 12 13 # routes, alphabetically 14 def comment_target_path comment, title = false 15 options = {anchor: "c_#{comment.short_id}"} 16 story = comment.story.merged_into_story || comment.story 17 options[:title] = story.title_as_slug if title 18 story_short_id_path(story, options) 19 end 20 21 def comment_target_url comment, title = story.title_as_slug, anchor:) 34 end 35 36 def url_or_comments_path story, *options 37 story.url.presence || title_path(story, *options) 38 end 39 40 def url_or_comments_url story, *options 41 story.url.presence || title_url(story, *options) 42 end 43 end 44 end ### extras/diff_bot.rb 1 # typed: false 2 3 class DiffBot 4 # see README.md on setting up credentials 5 6 DIFFBOT_API_URL = "http://www.diffbot.com/api/article".freeze 7 8 def self.get_story_text(story) 9 if !Rails.application.credentials.diffbot&.api_key || Rails.env.test? 10 return 11 end 12 13 return "" if story.url.nil? 14 15 # XXX: diffbot tries to read pdfs as text, so disable for now 16 if /\.pdf$/i.match?(story.url.to_s) 17 return nil 18 end 19 20 db_url = "#{DIFFBOT_API_URL}?token=#{Rails.application.credentials.diffbot.api_key}&url=#{CGI.escape(story.url)}" 21 22 begin 23 s = Sponge.new 24 # we're not doing this interactively, so take a while 25 s.timeout = 45 26 res = s.fetch(db_url).body 27 if res.present? 28 j = JSON.parse(res) 29 30 # turn newlines into double newlines, so they become paragraphs 31 j["text"] = j["text"].to_s.gsub("\n", "\n\n") 32 33 while j["text"].include?("\n\n\n") 34 j["text"].gsub!("\n\n\n", "\n\n") 35 end 36 37 return j["text"] 38 end 39 rescue => e 40 Rails.logger.error "error fetching #{db_url} #{e.backtrace.first} #{e.message}" 41 end 42 43 begin 44 s = Sponge.new 45 s.timeout = 45 46 s.fetch(story.archiveorg_url) 47 rescue => e 48 Rails.logger.error "error caching #{db_url}: #{e.backtrace.first} #{e.message}" 49 end 50 51 nil 52 end 53 end ### extras/mastodon.rb 1 # typed: false 2 3 class Mastodon 4 # see README.md on setting up credentials 5 6 def self.enabled? 7 Rails.application.credentials.mastodon.token.present? 8 end 9 10 MAX_STATUS_LENGTH = 500 # https://docs.joinmastodon.org/user/posting/#text 11 LINK_LENGTH = 23 # #{Rails.application.credentials.mastodon.token}"} 21 ) 22 raise "failed to accept follow request #{id}" if response.nil? 23 end 24 25 def self.add_list_accounts(accts) 26 s = Sponge.new 27 response = s.fetch( 28 "https://#{Rails.application.credentials.mastodon.instance_name}/api/v1/lists/#{Rails.application.credentials.mastodon.list_id}/accounts", 29 :post, 30 nil, 31 accts.map { |i| "account_ids[]=#{i}" }.join("&"), 32 {"Authorization" => "Bearer #{Rails.application.credentials.mastodon.token}"} 33 ) 34 raise "failed to add to list" if response.nil? || puts(response.body) || JSON.parse(response.body) != {} 35 end 36 37 def self.delete_post(story) 38 return nil if story.mastodon_id.nil? || story.mastodon_id == "0" 39 40 s = Sponge.new 41 s.fetch( 42 "https://#{Rails.application.credentials.mastodon.instance_name}/api/v1/statuses/#{story.mastodon_id}", 43 :delete, 44 {}, 45 nil, 46 {"Authorization" => "Bearer #{Rails.application.credentials.mastodon.token}"} 47 ) 48 end 49 50 def self.follow_account(id) 51 s = Sponge.new 52 response = s.fetch( 53         "app/models/story.rb:7 belongs_to merged_into_story; app/models/story.rb:13 has_many merged_stories dependent nullify.",
        "app/models/story.rb:18 has_many taggings dependent destroy; app/models/story.rb:35 has_many tags through taggings.",
        "app/models/story.rb:21 has_many suggested_taggings restrict; app/models/story.rb:23 has_many suggested_titles restrict.",

        "app/models/story.rb:36 has_many story votes dependent destroy; app/models/story.rb:39 has_many voters through votes.",

        "app/models/story.rb:44 has_one story_text using id as FK restrict.",
        "app/models/story.rb:45 has_many outbound links destroy; app/models/story.rb:48 has_many incoming_links restrict.",
